title: Research T-Echo GNSS 1PPS routing
description: Determine from LilyGO/Xinyuan manufacturer-grade artifacts whether each T-Echo hardware revision routes its GNSS module 1PPS output to the nRF52840 or an accessible pad/header, with exact revision/module evidence and source URLs.
acceptance_criteria: Report revision-specific positive proof, negative schematic proof, and absence of evidence using only official sources.
close_reason: Revision-specific GNSS PPS routing report completed
